allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; posts=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p[''slug'']\) for p in posts[:5]]")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const posts=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''public/data/blog-posts.json'',''utf8''\)\); const p=posts[0]||{}; const c=p.content?.rendered||''''; console.log\(''Content length:'',c.length\); console.log\(''First 2000 chars:''\); console.log\(c.substring\(0,2000\)\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='''';process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{try{const posts=JSON.parse\(d\);const p=posts[0]||{};const c=p.content?.rendered||'''';console.log\(''Posts count:'',posts.length\);console.log\(''Post 0 slug:'',p.slug\);console.log\(''Content length:'',c.length\);console.log\(''Has divi shortcodes:'',/\\[et_pb_/.test\(c\)\);console.log\(''First 2000 chars:''\);console.log\(c.substring\(0,2000\)\)}catch\(e\){console.log\(''Parse error:'',e.message\);console.log\(''Raw first 500:'',d.substring\(0,500\)\)}}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d='''';process.stdin.on\(''data'',c=>d+=c\);process.stdin.on\(''end'',\(\)=>{const posts=JSON.parse\(d\);const p=posts[0];const c=p.content.rendered;const decoded=c.replace\(/"/g,''""''\).replace\(/&/g,''&''\);const tags=[...decoded.matchAll\(/\\[\(et_pb_\\w+|wdcl_\\w+\)/g\)].map\(m=>m[1]\);const unique=[...new Set\(tags\)];console.log\(''Unique Divi tags found:'',unique\);console.log\(''Total tags:'',tags.length\)}\)")
